name_cn:
💰Sunflower Yellow·24cm
New LouLou Sheepskin model, soft to the touch, comes with a detachable card holder and a mini vanity mirror. Features a sliding chain, suitable for shoulder or crossbody wear to meet various outfit needs! The new sheepskin has a coating treatment, making it more durable and glossy, making the bag look exquisite and beautiful!
Model: 801437~
Size: 24×14×6cm
